hero.badge_2: FSPA Service Professional of the Year
hero.headline:
Sarasota's Most Trusted Pool Care
Team Since 2004
hero.subheadline: Over 500 five-star reviews and counting. From weekly maintenance to full renovations, the On-Time team shows up when we say we will and treats every pool like it belongs to a neighbor. Sit back, relax, and let Sarasota's award-winning pool pros handle it all.

services.label: How We Keep Sarasota Swimming
services.headline: Complete Pool Care From<br class="hidden md:block">Weekly Service to Full Renovations
services.subtitle: Whether your pool needs a weekly tune-up or a complete transformation, our licensed and award-winning team has handled it all for over two decades across Sarasota, Lakewood Ranch, and the barrier islands.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Service
cards.description: Chemical balancing, surface skimming, vacuuming, and equipment checks performed on a reliable weekly schedule. Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready without you lifting a finger.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Installation
cards.description: Variable-speed pumps, filters, heaters, salt systems, timers, and automation. We diagnose before we fix, and most repairs are completed the same visit.

cards.title: Green to Clean Recovery
cards.description: Algae-filled or neglected pool? We run a full diagnostic first, then bring it back to sparkling condition. Emergency response available for the worst cases.

cards.title: Pool Automation
cards.description: Control your pump, heater, and lights from your phone. We install and configure smart pool systems so you can manage everything from the couch or the office.

cards.title: Pool Renovations
cards.description: Resurfacing, custom tile, pavers, equipment upgrades, and structural repairs. We turn tired pools into backyard showpieces that add value to your home.

cards.title: Water Chemistry Management
cards.description: Precise chemical analysis and balancing that keeps water safe, clear, and gentle on skin. No guesswork, just science-backed results every visit.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Schedule Your Free Inspection
steps.description: Tell us about your pool and we will send a technician for a complimentary diagnostic inspection. No sales pitch, no pressure — just an honest assessment and a fair quote.

steps.title: We Show Up On Time, Every Time
steps.description: Our trained, background-checked technicians arrive on the day and time promised. We handle cleaning, chemistry, equipment checks, and anything else your pool needs.

steps.title: Enjoy Crystal-Clear Water
steps.description: Your pool stays swim-ready year-round. If you are ever not satisfied, we come back and make it right at no charge. That is the On-Time promise.

about.label: Why Sarasota Trusts On-Time
about.headline: 22 Years of Showing Up and Getting It Right
about.description: Founded in 2004 and now led by Adam Courter, On-Time Pool Service was built on a simple idea: show up when you say you will, do the work right, and treat every pool like it belongs to a neighbor. That approach has earned us over 500 five-star Google reviews, Service Professional of the Year from the Florida Swimming Pool Association, and three consecutive Herald Tribune Readers' Choice Awards. Our core values of Respect, Integrity, Communication, Quality, and Adaptability are not just words on a wall — they guide every interaction.

features.title: Licensed & Fully Credentialed
features.description: Licensed Pool Contractor (CPC#1459543), LP Gas Installer, FSPA member, and BBB A+ rated. Every credential your pool deserves.

features.title: Diagnose Before We Fix
features.description: We never guess. Every repair and cleaning starts with a thorough diagnostic so you know exactly what your pool needs and what it will cost.

features.title: No Contracts, No Surprises
features.description: We earn your business every single visit. No long-term commitments, no cancellation fees. Stay because you want to, not because you have to.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. Zero Hidden Fees.
pricing.subtitle: Every pool gets a personalized quote after a free inspection. No contracts, no commitments — just honest pricing for award-winning service.

guarantee.headline: Our "On-Time, Done-Right" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you are not 100% satisfied with any service visit, we come back and redo it at no charge — no questions asked, no hoops to jump through. With 532+ five-star reviews and 22 years in business, our reputation is built on keeping this promise every single day.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start weekly service?
faqs.answer: Most new clients in the Sarasota area are on our schedule within 3-5 business days. For green pool emergencies, we offer priority response. Call us at 941-224-0404 and we will get you started.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home when your team services the pool?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most clients provide gate or yard access. After every visit, you will know exactly what was done and how your pool is looking. We treat your property with the same care as our own.

faqs.question: Are your technicians licensed and insured?
faqs.answer: Yes. On-Time Pool Service holds a Pool Contractor License (CPC#1459543), LP Gas Installer license, and carries full liability insurance. We are also a member of the Florida Swimming Pool Association and BBB A+ rated.

faqs.question: What if I need to cancel my service?
faqs.answer: Cancel anytime with zero penalties. We do not believe in locking people into contracts. We keep clients because of the quality of our work, not because of fine print.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve around Sarasota?
faqs.answer: We serve Sarasota, Lakewood Ranch, Siesta Key, Bird Key, Casey Key, Longboat Key, Lido Key, Palmer Ranch, The Meadows, Bradenton, Venice, Nokomis, University Park, and surrounding communities.

testimonials.name: Cheryl S.
testimonials.text: On-Time Pool is just what it says, always on time. And excellent work. Our pool looked absolutely amazing for our wedding party. Could not recommend them more highly.

testimonials.name: Jeffs V.
testimonials.text: We have used On-Time Pools for nearly 15 years and have always found them to be very reliable. Their consistency and attention to detail is why we have never switched to anyone else.

testimonials.name: Esslinger B.
testimonials.text: On-Time Pool Service is always there for me when I call with an issue. They are the complete package and worth every penny. Truly the best pool company in the area.

Always Swim-Ready?
contact.subtitle: Get a free diagnostic inspection and honest quote from Sarasota's most reviewed pool service company. No contracts, no pressure — just 22 years of expertise at your service.
